channel.title: MindExtract
channel.description: MindExtract — download and transcribe video from anywhere

item.title: Version 1.4.2
item.description:
What's New in 1.4.2

  • Fixed model detection — Downloaded WhisperKit models are now correctly detected and ready for transcription
  • Movable transcription window — The transcription result now opens in its own window that you can freely move and resize
  • Better progress indicators — Clearer status messages when loading the AI model, extracting audio, and transcribing
